description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a dark, rich finish and a simple, modern design. The tabletop is flat and smooth, supported by four straight, slightly tapered legs positioned at each corner. The edges of the tabletop are clean and squared, with a subtle trim detail running along the perimeter just below the surface. The wood grain is visible across the tabletop and legs, giving the table a natural and elegant appearance. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional features, emphasizing its minimalist style. The table appears sturdy and is suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public seating areas.
description: A dark wooden rectangular table with a smooth top and four straight legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design. The visible wood grain and clean lines give it an elegant, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and two front legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean edge trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the tabletop and the alignment of the legs, with the wood grain running lengthwise.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the tabletop and legs, with consistent trim and finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the depth and leg placement with visible wood grain.
